name: task-handoff-summaries
description: Structured implementation, handoff, and closeout summaries. Three rigorous report formats — one for implementation done before commit, one for multi-agent worker handoff to an orchestrator, one for closeout after completion. Each has a fixed field set, hard rules against using the summary to mask incomplete work, and bead/task-aware vocabulary. Composes with structured-code-review (the reviewer's input package) and multi-agent-git-workflow (role vocabulary).
